title: Analysing Mobile Contracts
context: Contract A: £18/month, 12 months, 5GB data, £50 upfront. Contract B: £22/month, 24 months, unlimited data, £0 upfront. Contract C: £15/month, SIM only, 8GB, no commitment.

english_section.instruction: Answer the English questions about contracts.

questions.question: What does 'upfront cost' mean?
options: Money you pay at the beginning
questions.answer: Money you pay at the beginning

questions.question: What is a 'SIM only' deal?
options: A plan without a new phone included
A plan with a free phone
questions.answer: A plan without a new phone included

maths_section.instruction: Calculate the total costs over the contract period.

questions.question: Contract A total cost (12 months + upfront)?
